raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "RLS missing on GET /skills/{name} — allows enumeration of internal skill names by unauthenticated users", "recommended_fix": "Add @router.get(..., dependencies=[Depends(RootTokenHeader)]) to enforce authentication"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/main.py", "issue": "Missing rate limit on /api/skills POST — vulnerable to brute-force skill injection", "recommended_fix": "Apply fastapi-limiter decorator with 5/minute limit per IP"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/lib/api.ts", "issue": "API base URL hardcoded in client — risk of exposing staging envs in prod builds", "recommended_fix": "Use runtime environment variable VITE_API_URL"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "Unvalidated input in assessment_id — susceptible to UUID injection attacks", "recommended_fix": "Add Pydantic UUID4 validation and server-side existence check"}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "apps/api/.env", "issue": "SECRET_KEY present in codebase — exposed in git history and client builds", "recommended_fix": "Move to Supabase secrets, access via os.getenv('SECRET_KEY')"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/routes/AssessmentResult.svelte", "issue": "Direct DOM insertion of assessment feedback — risk of XSS from malicious skill output", "recommended_fix": "Sanitize with DOMPurify before innerHTML assignment"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/auth.py", "issue": "Incomplete OWASP Top 10 compliance — missing security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options)", "recommended_fix": "Add SecurityHeaders middleware with strict policy"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/profile.py", "issue": "Overfetching in /profile GET — returns full user object including is_platform_admin", "recommended_fix": "Return strict subset: id, avatar_url, account_type only"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/lib/analytics.js", "issue": "Analytics tracker sends raw assessment answers — violates data minimization principle", "recommended_fix": "Hash answers client-side before transmission"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/zeus.py", "issue": "Missing RLS on GET /zeus/events — exposes governance logs to unauthenticated users", "recommended_fix": "Enforce RootTokenHeader dependency and scope to requesting user"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "SECRET_KEY in repo is active credential — rotate immediately"}

findings.issue: RLS missing on GET /skills/{name} — allows enumeration of internal skill names by unauthenticated users
Missing rate limit on /api/skills POST — vulnerable to brute-force skill injection
findings.recommended_fix: Apply fastapi-limiter decorator with 5/minute limit per IP

findings.issue: API base URL hardcoded in client — risk of exposing staging envs in prod builds
Unvalidated input in assessment_id — susceptible to UUID injection attacks
findings.recommended_fix: Add Pydantic UUID4 validation and server-side existence check

findings.issue: SECRET_KEY present in codebase — exposed in git history and client builds
findings.recommended_fix: Move to Supabase secrets, access via os.getenv('SECRET_KEY')

findings.issue: Direct DOM insertion of assessment feedback — risk of XSS from malicious skill output
findings.recommended_fix: Sanitize with DOMPurify before innerHTML assignment

findings.issue: Incomplete OWASP Top 10 compliance — missing security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options)
findings.recommended_fix: Add SecurityHeaders middleware with strict policy

findings.issue: Overfetching in /profile GET — returns full user object including is_platform_admin
findings.recommended_fix: Return strict subset: id, avatar_url, account_type only

findings.issue: Analytics tracker sends raw assessment answers — violates data minimization principle
Missing RLS on GET /zeus/events — exposes governance logs to unauthenticated users
findings.recommended_fix: Enforce RootTokenHeader dependency and scope to requesting user

whistleblower_flag: SECRET_KEY in repo is active credential — rotate immediately
